intro: Production systems. Real deployments. Practical architecture.

featured.title: Microservices Platform — 16 Services, Full Stack
featured.subtitle: Rust · Python · Go · TypeScript · Multi-Cloud · Terraform IaC · GitHub Actions CI/CD
featured.description: 16-service distributed platform spanning Rust/Axum, Python/FastAPI, Go, and TypeScript — deployed across GCP Cloud Run and Fly.io with event streaming, multi-language orchestration, and security-hardened CI/CD.
highlights: 16 independently deployed services: 10 Rust microservices, 1 Python orchestrator, 1 Go gateway, 4 TS/React frontends
Multi-cloud deployment: GCP Cloud Run (primary) + Fly.io (secondary), OIDC-secured CI/CD pipelines
Event-driven architecture with Go SSE service, DynamoDB medallion pipeline (Bronze/Silver/Gold), Celery async tasks
AI integration: Claude 3.5 + Gemini via dedicated Python/FastAPI orchestrator with streaming responses
Cross-service JWT auth, rate limiting, CORS enforcement, encrypted secrets management
Terraform-managed infrastructure: IaC for Cloud Run, Cloud SQL, Artifact Registry, VPC, IAM, SOC 2 controls
9 SOC 2 Type II compliance controls: audit logging, non-root containers, least-privilege IAM, secrets purging

others.title: Observaboard — Observability Dashboard
others.subtitle: Python · Django 5 · DRF · HTMX · Celery · PostgreSQL FTS · Fly.io
others.description: Full-stack observability platform with a live HTMX dashboard, REST API, Celery async event classification, and PostgreSQL full-text search — deployed on Fly.io with CI/CD.
highlights: Live dashboard with real-time filtering via HTMX partial swaps — no SPA, no build step
POST /api/ingest/ accepts webhooks from any source with API key auth
Celery async classification assigns category (deployment/security/alert/metric/info) and severity from raw payload
PostgreSQL SearchVectorField + GIN index for full-text search across event summaries
Dual auth — JWT for API consumers, custom Api-Key header for ingest sources
OpenAPI/Swagger docs auto-generated via drf-spectacular
81-test pytest suite covering models, serializers, auth, views, tasks, and dashboard
Rate limiting via DRF ScopedRateThrottle on ingest (100/min) and search (30/min) endpoints
Health endpoint with DB + Redis connectivity checks returning 503 on degradation
Multi-stage Docker build with non-root user, WhiteNoise static serving, zero-downtime Fly.io deploys

others.title: SOC 2 Baseline — Terraform Module
others.subtitle: Cloud-agnostic · GCP + AWS · IaC · Security Controls
others.description: Cloud-agnostic GCP + AWS Terraform module encoding 9 SOC 2 Type II controls: IAM least-privilege, secrets management, VPC segmentation, audit logging, and non-root containers.
highlights: Cloud-agnostic: parallel GCP and AWS sub-modules with identical control surface
9 SOC 2 Type II controls mapped to exact implementation files
Audit logging sinks for Secret Manager, Cloud SQL, and Cloud Run data access events
Non-root container enforcement via ECS task policy and GCP Org Policy documentation

others.title: CI/CD Pipeline Template
others.subtitle: Cloud-agnostic · GCP Cloud Run + AWS ECS · GitHub Actions · OIDC
others.description: Cloud-agnostic GitHub Actions reference: dev → staging → prod promotion gates, automated health-check rollback on GCP Cloud Run and AWS ECS, environment-scoped OIDC secret injection.
highlights: Cloud-agnostic: GCP and AWS rollback scripts share identical shell interface
Automated rollback — polls /health for 90s, reverts traffic on failure
Environment-scoped OIDC: staging and prod each hold isolated credentials
Forkable template with prereq checklist and architecture diagram in docs/

others.title: DynamoDB Idempotency Prototype
others.subtitle: AWS + GCP focus · Rust · DynamoDB · CloudTrail/Cloud Logging · Splunk HEC
others.description: Rust prototype for exactly-once cloud audit log delivery to Splunk HEC via DynamoDB conditional writes with TTL expiry.
highlights: Atomic conditional PutItem ensures only one Lambda processes each event, even under retries
AWS CloudTrail and GCP Cloud Logging treated as equal focus areas
TTL-based record expiry keeps the table lean without manual cleanup
Duplicate counter tracks retry frequency for operational visibility
Status lifecycle: processing → done / failed, each with a timestamp
Auth hardened post-audit: all dashboard endpoints gated, OIDC CI migration, dev bypass removed

others.title: CloudTrail Medallion Data Pipeline
others.subtitle: Bronze/Silver/Gold · AWS + GCP parity · Azure-ready
others.description: Medallion pipeline (Bronze/Silver/Gold) across AWS + GCP with idempotency-guaranteed ingestion and Databricks-ready output.
highlights: Bronze layer preserves immutable raw events for auditability and replay
Silver layer applies schema normalisation, enrichment, and PII-safe shaping
Gold layer aggregates operational and security metrics for Databricks-ready models
AWS and GCP parity in pipeline design and ingestion guarantees
Terraform modules define portable pipeline infrastructure across environments
Conditional-write idempotency so retries never double-count
